name: FNS Freya
desc: Named for the Norse goddess of fertility and struggle. The mission flagship, now deployed on Mairee, repurposed as the Freya Homestead. Contains FreyOps Central (FOX), Comms-Bay, Homestead Dome (assembly hall), Stasis Bay, storage locations, GRID operations, medical facilities, sports and entertainment, schools and daycare, mess halls, and residential hexagonal hab blocks.
narration: The flagship. Repurposed as a village. Three thousand people now call her home. Nobody chose her. She chose them.

name: FNS Brisinger
desc: The last ship to breach the Fold before its collapse. Connection lost. Status: unknown.
narration: The last ship through the door before it slammed shut. Came out the other side wearing flowers. Do not ask. Do not board.

name: FNS Dáinn
desc: Carries critical industrial machinery including ore processors and reactor parts for the Plateau. Contains the Stingray shuttle, the Orrery lab, Mess Halls, and the Tank therapy space. Eventually hauled to the Yreus Station.
narration: The toolbox. Reactors. Ore processors. The engines of the next century. Without her, we are extremely well-organized cavemen.

name: FNS Yggdrasil
desc: Arrived first to establish the Mairee bridgehead. Dismantled into the orbital network: Root rings at the Homestead, Leaf became the Delta camp, Trunk became Orbital Command.
narration: The Tree. Cut into pieces to prop up the ceiling. Her roots became the Homestead. Her leaf became the Delta camp. Her trunk became Orbital Command. Whoever named her was an optimist.

name: FNS Ivaldi
desc: The industrial ship, landed and deployed onto the Plateau to form the Ivaldi Operations Base. Houses the Maw ore processor, the Masonic order's secret chambers including the Star Chamber and the Anchor.
narration: The Anvil. Dropped onto the Plateau and told to stay there. The Masons live in her belly now. They built a temple in the basement. Of course they did.

name: FNS Bygul
desc: One of two two-million-ton cargo haulers tethered to Orbital Command. Carries botanical ecosystem cargo for the Delta.
narration: Two million tons of cargo, tethered in orbit, waiting patiently to be unloaded. Patiently is generous. Her captain is not.

name: FNS Trjegul
desc: One of two two-million-ton cargo haulers tethered to Orbital Command, commanded by the sharp-tongued Captain Mei Chezin.
narration: Bygul's twin. Same cargo. Different captain — the one who reads the Fleet Charter at the Directorate on an open channel. Patience ran out about a click ago.

name: FNS Mimir
desc: One of the 'Stragglers' caught on the Sol side when the Fold collapsed. Frank Muro's adopted son Mo serves aboard it.
narration: Sol side. We sing for her in the dark. She does not hear us. Frank's son is aboard. He still writes.

name: FNS Alsvin
desc: The fabrication vessel assigned to orbital components. One of the 'Stragglers' caught on the Sol side when the Fold collapsed. Laura Savannen (Oliver's mother) is station here.
narration: The fabrication ship. Oliver's mother boarded her for the next transit. There was no next transit. She is still aboard. Probably.

name: FNS Muninn
desc: Sensor and science vessel. One of the 'Stragglers' caught on the Sol side when the Fold collapsed. Without it, the colony remains mostly blind to Mairee's weather and spore storms.
narration: The eyes we don't have. Lost to the Fold. The reason we don't know what the spore storms are going to do until they are already doing it.

name: FNS Hugin
desc: Second science vessel. One of the 'Stragglers' caught on the Sol side when the Fold collapsed. Loss compounds the colony's inability to further explore the Yreus system.
narration: Muninn's twin. Also lost. We are now a colony of very thoughtful guesses.

name: Stingray
desc: A sleek black composite shuttle home to theFNS Dáinn, broad-winged, built to absorb light and radar. Used to probe the Brisinger. Piloted by Alistair Hale.
narration: Built to absorb light and questions. When somebody needs to look at something nobody is supposed to look at, this is what they take out.

name: Depeche
desc: Corbin's personal executive shuttle capable of crossing the Corridor.
narration: Corbin's ride. Black. Quiet. Punctual. Her arrival is never good news.

name: Beetle
desc: Light-class shuttle piloted by Nabiha Al-Fahim. Capable of scouting terrain.
narration: Nabiha's shuttle. Small. Ugly. Indestructible. Pilots love her. Engineers do not.

name: Vanguard
desc: Escort-class shuttle stationed on Orbital Command.
narration: Bellamy's gun. A small escort with teeth, parked on Orbital Command. Brought out when the Directorate has run out of polite words.
